```text
quickstart/
├── daml/
│   ├── licensing/daml/Licensing/
│   │   ├── AppInstall.daml    # user onboarding
│   │   ├── License.daml       # license management
│   │   └── Util.daml          # helper functions
│   ├── licensing-tests/       # Daml Script tests
│   └── dars/                  # Splice DARs
├── backend/                   # API integration points
├── frontend/                  # UI
├── common/                    # OpenAPI definition
├── config/                    # nginx proxy configuration
└── docker/                    # Deployment: Keycloak OAuth2 realms, port settings
```
